hooks.command: if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git stash push -m "auto-stash-before-claude-session-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)" 2>&1 && git stash pop 2>&1 && echo '{"systemMessage":"Safety snapshot created in git reflog. Working tree unchanged."}'; else echo '{"systemMessage":"No uncommitted changes to snapshot."}'; fi

if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git stash push -m "auto-stash-before-claude-session-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)" 2>&1 && echo '{"systemMessage":"Auto-stashed uncommitted changes. Use git stash pop to restore."}'; else echo '{"systemMessage":"No uncommitted changes to stash."}'; fi

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'git (checkout|clean|reset --hard|push --force|push -f|branch -D)' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: Destructive git command. Run manually if needed."}' && exit 2 || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qiE '(gh (issue|pr) (create|comment|edit)|curl.*(api\.github|hooks\.slack)|echo.*>>.*\.github)' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: This command posts to a public service. Review content for sensitive data before running manually."}' && exit 2 || true

TRACKER="/tmp/claude-circuit-breaker-${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:-default}"; jq -r '.tool_name' >> "$TRACKER"; LINES=$(wc -l < "$TRACKER" | tr -d ' '); if [ "$LINES" -ge 3 ]; then UNIQUE=$(tail -3 "$TRACKER" | sort -u | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$UNIQUE" -eq 1 ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUseFailure","additionalContext":"CIRCUIT BREAKER: 3 consecutive failures of the same tool. STOP retrying the same approach. Root-cause analyse: (1) state what you tried and why it failed each time, (2) list the actual error messages, (3) propose a DIFFERENT approach based on the evidence. Do not retry without approval."}}'; fi; fi
